title: b1.7.3 Book And Quill
description: this mod add Book And Quill and Written Book to b1.7.3
body:
This Mod add *Book And Quill* and *Written Book* to b1.7.3. it is identical to how it work in 1.3.1

Crafting recipe is the Same as Modern Minecraft

Written Book doesn't have enchanted effect

Require [Babric](https://babric.github.io/) and [StationAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/stationapi) for StationAPI version

Require [ModLoader](https://mcarchive.net/mods/modloader?gvsn=b1.7.3) and [ItemNbt](https://github.com/MartinSVK12/retrostorage/releases/download/a1.5pre1/b1.7.3_ItemNBT_1.2.zip) for RML version

![Book And Quill Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c65096ff1bce0bb4f7daf75b6de7f13e2cfc27e9.png)
